strategy: He stacks damage-reduction on you with Plague every third Round and a 6-Round Virulence every sixth Round, so pack Cleanse Charm or plan your big hit for a Round when the weaknesses are lightest.
Cast your finisher the Round after a cleanse, or use pierce and heavy blades to punch through the stacked weaknesses.
He resists Death 73% and other schools 43% but takes 30% more from Life, so a Life hitter is ideal.
Watch for random Ship of Fools; keep your setup compact and hit before the weakness layers pile up.
cheatNotes: He cheat-casts Ship of Fools on you at random.
At the start of every third Round he cheat-casts Plague, cutting your damage.
At the start of every sixth Round he cheat-casts a 6-Round Virulence, stacking more damage reduction.
